scripts.init: rm -rf src && rm -rf abap2UI5 &&  mkdir src && git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/abap2UI5/abap2UI5.git && cp -r abap2UI5/src/* src/
scripts.syfixes: find . -type f -name '*.abap' -exec sed -i -e 's/ RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_sy_itab_line_not_found/ ASSERT 1 = 0/g' {} +
scripts.syfixes-mac: find . -type f -name '*.abap' -exec sed -i '' -e 's/ RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_sy_itab_line_not_found/ ASSERT 1 = 0/g' {} +
scripts.downport2: rm -rf downport && mkdir downport && cp -r src/* downport/ && cp -r lib/* downport/ && abaplint --fix ./ci/abaplint-downport.jsonc
scripts.downport: rm -rf downport && mkdir downport && cp -r src/* downport/ && cp -r lib/* downport/ && abaplint --fix ./ci/abaplint-downport.jsonc && npm run syfixes-mac
scripts.build: npm install && npm run downport && npm run transpile && rm -rf src && rm -rf downport && rm -rf abap2UI5
scripts.clean: rm -rf src && rm -rf abap2UI5 && rm -rf downport && rm -rf output && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.all: npm run init && npm run build && npm run start
